reviews.review_body: it's big and has quite good infrastructure . Had this school been in another sector may 40x or 30x I think I would have been one of the top schools in Noida

reviews.author: Aditya Singh
reviews.review_body:
Passed from this school in 2018. You know when you passed from a school then you can't able to tell any cons of that school😂😂 I don't why, but still I'm very attached with this school. Wish I could relive that life in school🤧.

Hey why don't you guys do a alumni meet, you'll get stories to motivate your upcoming batch. You'll also find that the Backbenchers who always scolded by each and every teacher😂😂. Became a successful person in life.

reviews.author: Mohd Saquib
reviews.review_body: Its a good school overall speaking. I have personally studied here. For sports it has a big football ground, basketball court, volleyball court and badminton court. Also has a big swimming pool with regular swimming classes. Smart classes are also there. Teachers are friendly and helpful. But one annoyance about every private school is their fee which is always high. I rated 4 stars and not 5 just because of the fee which I think should be a bit less. Apart from that the school and its facilities are good.

reviews.author: Sana Khan
reviews.review_body: I am studying in this school it is very best school education is best teacher's is best
